name: Agitator — Anchor
svg_data:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     data-io-shape="agitator-anchor"
     data-io-version="2"
     data-io-category="agitators"
     viewBox="0 0 40 80">
  <g class="io-shape-body">
    <!-- Shaft -->
    <line x1="20" y1="7" x2="20" y2="30" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Coupling circle at top -->
    <circle cx="20" cy="5" r="3" fill="none" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Anchor frame — horizontal cross-arms then vertical legs to bottom bar -->
    <line x1="20" y1="30" x2="14" y2="30" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="14" y1="30" x2="14" y2="64" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="14" y1="64" x2="26" y2="64" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="26" y1="64" x2="26" y2="30" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="26" y1="30" x2="20" y2="30" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  </g>
  <g class="io-connections" display="none">
    <!-- Top of coupling circle (cy=5 r=3 → top at y=2) → nozzle 2 units above -->
    <circle r="2" fill="none" stroke="#4A9EFF" stroke-width="1" data-io-conn-id="nozzle-top" cx="20" cy="0"/>
  </g>
</svg>

name: Air Cooler / Fin-Fan
svg_data:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
     data-io-shape="air-cooler"
     data-io-version="2"
     data-io-category="heat-transfer"
     viewBox="-8 0 76 38">
  <g class="io-shape-body">
    <!-- Housing (open-bottom box) -->
    <line x1="5" y1="5" x2="55" y2="5" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="5" y1="5" x2="5" y2="27" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <line x1="55" y1="5" x2="55" y2="27" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Process tube coil (zigzag) -->
    <polyline points="-4,11 5,11 9,14 14,8 19,14 24,8 29,14 34,8 39,14 44,8 49,14 52,11 55,11 63,11" fill="none" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <!-- Flow direction arrow -->
    <polyline points="59,8 63,11 59,14" fill="none" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="0.75"/>
    <!-- Fan blades (stateful — rotate with fan operation) -->
    <path class="io-stateful" d="M30,22 C30,21 8,18 8,22 C8,26 30,23 30,22 Z" fill="none" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="0.75"/>
    <path class="io-stateful" d="M30,22 C30,21 52,18 52,22 C52,26 30,23 30,22 Z" fill="none" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="0.75"/>
    <!-- Fan shaft -->
    <line x1="30" y1="22" x2="30" y2="30" stroke="#808080" stroke-width="0.75"/>
  </g>
  <g class="io-connections" display="none">
    <circle r="2" fill="none" stroke="#4A9EFF" stroke-width="1" data-io-conn-id="tube-in" cx="-4" cy="11"/>
    <circle r="2" fill="none" stroke="#4A9EFF" stroke-width="1" data-io-conn-id="tube-out" cx="63" cy="11"/>
  </g>
</svg>
